data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pay run statements being able to drill down to staffing and timesheet evidence. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this capability. The linked use case mentions the need for such functionality, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this requirement is fulfilled in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence confirming that pay run statements can drill down to staffing and timesheet evidence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for pay run statement drill down
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that pay run statements include links to staffing and timesheet evidence.
